Idea Name: AI-Based Climate Resilient Water Resource Management System
Expected benefits:
Improved water allocation efficiency

Early warning for droughts and floods

Enhanced climate resilience planning
Idea Description: This project aims to develop an AI-driven decision support system to predict water availability, drought risk, and flood scenarios by analyzing rainfall patterns, river basin data, groundwater levels, satellite imagery, and historical climate data. The system assists governments and water authorities in optimizing irrigation schedules, reservoir operations, and disaster preparedness plans.
potentail Challenges:
Integrating heterogeneous data sources such as hydrological sensors, satellite data, and meteorological APIs

Managing missing or noisy environmental data

Adapting predictions to regional climate variability
